features: Paper size: Each pack contains 60 sheets of white craft paper measuring 210 x 297 mm and weighing 250 gsm
Multiple uses: These thick gold handmade papers can be widely used at home, office, school, classroom, art class, children's coloring and so on.
Unique Design:Our gold cardstock has a reflective effect. The cardstock is one sided with a white back. It is a reflective card that will not be dusted with powder and will not fall off.

Application: A4 cards are ideal for homemade thank you cards, flashcards, Christmas cards, vocabulary cards and much more. Suitable for making thank you cards, gift cards, place cards, business cards, task cards and more.
description: Product Description High Quality Material Easy to DIY The card stock is easy to cut using craft scissors or a die-cutting hine. DIY Design This gold mirrored cardstock can be used to make crafts with your friends, decorate birthday party favors and more!
